reasoning_model_1: Model 1 fails significantly on Content Accuracy. The user requested the text '这个方案，好，我们通过了', but the model generated '再好，这个方案好，我们通过了'. It appears to have hallucinated text ('再好') at the beginning, possibly leaking part of the prompt instructions ('在好...') into the speech. Because of this addition and the resulting change in sentence structure (treating '方案好' as 'plan is good' rather than an interjection), the specific instruction to pause *after* '好' as a standalone marker is not effectively or correctly realized. According to the scoring criteria, content inconsistency warrants a score of 0.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 demonstrates perfect Content Accuracy, speaking exactly '这个方案，好，我们通过了' without any hallucinations. Regarding the 'Feature Control' (Pause), the model successfully implements a distinct and natural pause after the word '好' (Hao). The rhythm is '这个方案' (short pause) '好' (noticeable pause) '我们通过了', which perfectly aligns with the user's specific command to pause noticeably after '好'. The prosody is natural and fluent.
model_comparison: Model 1 is disqualified due to severe content accuracy issues (instruction leakage/hallucination causing extra words '再好'), which also disrupted the target prosody. Model 2 followed the script perfectly and accurately executed the required paralinguistic feature (a distinct pause after the specific word). Therefore, Model 2 is superior.
